name: Jinko
short_description: Jinko is a physics-based musical arcade game where balls fall to the rhythm, and your job is to keep them up! Fight against gravity and time across a variety of unique songs and levels, or challenge yourself in the arcade mode to see how your best score stacks up on the global leaderboard.
detailed_description:
Use physics and musical abilities to become the ultimate keep up player!

  • ARCADE

With an endless number of Jinko balls and only three lives, you must survive for as long as possible before getting overwhelmed in the arcade mode. Track your stats and progress to see your improvement, and flaunt your high score to the world on the global leaderboard.

  • LEVELS

Challenge your reaction time and hand-eye coordination through 20 songs boasting a variety of times and beats per minute in the levels mode. As Jinko balls fall to the tempo of the soundtrack, you'll be forced overcome difficult situations with precise control and lightning-fast decision making to conquer each level.

  • CUSTOM

Unleash your creativity with the custom level editor mode, where you can craft and save your own unique challenges. Modify every detail, from lives and gravity to time and spawn rate, and put your creation to the test or challenge friends to beat it by sending them your custom code.

  • FREEPLAY

Practice fancy tricks, refine your skills, or fidget around with as many Jinko balls as your heart desires in the freeplay mode. Relax and destress or create musical masterpieces with satisfying musical notes that play based on how hard each Jinko ball is hit.
